content:
RORK вЂ” FINAL BUILD 33 DEPLOYMENT AND REAL-DEVICE VERIFICATION

STOP ALL NEW DEVELOPMENT.

The code-level audit is complete.

The project is NOT complete until Build 33 is installed and verified on a physical Android device.

Do not return another code summary.
Do not return PASS вЂ” CODE as final verification.
Do not claim IVX Enterprise Production Verified until every runtime check below passes.

FINAL BUILD

Use only:

- Build: 33
- Signed release APK
- Package: com.ivxholdings.app
- Exact GitHub SHA embedded in Build 33
- Matching Render backend SHA
- Matching /health SHA
- Matching diagnostics SHA

Before device testing, verify:

GitHub SHA
=
APK embedded SHA
=
Render deployed SHA
=
/health SHA
=
diagnostics SHA

Return the full 40-character values.

If any SHA differs, stop, rebuild or redeploy, and verify again.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 1 вЂ” PROVIDE DIRECT APK
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Return a direct working APK download link.

The link must:

- download the .apk file directly
- not require terminal commands
- not require curl
- not require ADB
- work from Android Chrome or Samsung Internet
- not expire during testing
- match Build 33
- include SHA-256

Return:

- filename
- direct download link
- file size
- SHA-256
- versionName
- versionCode
- package ID
- embedded Git SHA

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 2 вЂ” CLEAN INSTALL
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

On a physical Android device:

1. Uninstall every previous IVX build.
2. Confirm only one IVX package exists.
3. Reboot the phone.
4. Download Build 33.
5. Install Build 33.
6. Confirm package ID.
7. Confirm versionCode 33.
8. Start screen recording.
9. Start Android logcat.
10. Launch the application.

Required:

- installation succeeds
- no signature conflict
- no older APK remains
- correct build opens

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 3 вЂ” OWNER LOGIN
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Test every owner-login root live.

1. Cold launch.
2. Confirm Owner Login appears.
3. Confirm no automatic owner login.
4. Confirm no black screen.
5. Confirm no infinite spinner.
6. Confirm no Maximum Update Depth error.
7. Enter owner email manually.
8. Enter password manually.
9. Press Sign In once.
10. Confirm exactly one login request.
11. Confirm production Supabase session is created.
12. Confirm authenticated user ID is returned.
13. Confirm canonical owner profile is queried.
14. Confirm role = owner.
15. Confirm active = true.
16. Confirm owner authorization succeeds.
17. Confirm red вЂњnot the IVX ownerвЂќ warning disappears.
18. Confirm owner route opens.
19. Confirm no duplicate redirect.
20. Confirm no stale non-owner session remains.

Return:

- trace ID
- masked email
- masked user ID
- Supabase project reference
- role result
- active result
- authorization result
- login latency
- screenshot after successful login

Mark:

PASS вЂ” REAL DEVICE

only when the correct owner account opens Owner AI without the red warning.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 4 вЂ” OWNER AI
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

1. Open Owner AI.
2. Confirm composer is enabled.
3. Confirm attachment button is enabled.
4. Confirm microphone is enabled.
5. Enter a real test message.
6. Press Send once.
7. Confirm one outbound request.
8. Confirm backend owner validation.
9. Confirm HTTP 200.
10. Confirm AI response appears.
11. Confirm no duplicate message.
12. Navigate away.
13. Return to conversation.
14. Confirm message persists.
15. Force-stop and reopen.
16. Confirm conversation history remains available according to policy.

Return:

- message ID
- request endpoint
- HTTP status
- response latency
- trace ID
- screenshot/video timestamp

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 5 вЂ” OWNER CONTROL
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Test:

- yellow Control button
- Owner AI Control shortcut
- direct Control route
- deep link
- Android Back behavior

Required:

- owner opens Control
- non-owner cannot open Control
- no route flash before authorization
- live production data loads
- no placeholder data
- no blank screen

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 6 вЂ” ADMIN
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Verify live on the device:

1. Admin Dashboard
2. Business Overview
3. Diagnostics
4. Revenue
5. Users
6. Members
7. Investors
8. Projects
9. Deals
10. Properties
11. Settings
12. Notifications Admin

For every screen return:

- route
- data source
- load result
- owner access result
- trace ID
- PASS or FAIL

Required:

- all screens load real data
- no placeholder values
- no client-only access
- backend/RLS authorization active

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 7 вЂ” MODULE QA
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Test every module in this exact order.

1. HOME
   - opens
   - live data loads
   - no admin-only metrics shown publicly

2. MEMBERS
   - first page loads
   - infinite scroll works
   - pagination works
   - no duplicates
   - search works

3. INVESTORS
   - list loads
   - details open
   - real rows visible

4. PROJECTS
   - dashboard loads
   - progressive loading works
   - images load
   - detail opens

5. DEALS
   - three live deals confirmed
   - pagination works
   - detail opens
   - admin edit works

6. REELS
   - feed opens
   - six backend videos confirmed
   - autoplay works
   - only visible reel plays
   - previous reel pauses
   - next reel preloads
   - no black frame
   - no flicker
   - pagination works

7. CHAT
   - room connects
   - send works
   - receive works
   - messages persist
   - no duplicates

8. UPLOADS
   - image picker opens
   - image upload succeeds
   - video picker opens
   - video upload succeeds
   - progress displays
   - processing status completes

9. CRM
   - list loads
   - contact details display
   - notes persist

10. ADMIN
   - dashboard loads
   - CRUD works
   - role protection works

11. LANDING
   - renders
   - live content displays
   - registration submits

12. NOTIFICATIONS
   - list loads
   - infinite scroll works
   - mark read works
   - navigation works

Return PASS or FAIL for all 12 modules.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 8 вЂ” MEDIA PERFORMANCE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Verify:

- video autoplay
- video upload
- image upload
- thumbnail-first loading
- progressive loading
- infinite scroll
- pagination
- no flickering
- no loading loop
- no full-screen freeze
- no repeated media download
- no black frames
- one active video player only

Test with:

- Wi-Fi
- mobile data
- slow connection
- network interruption
- restored connection

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 9 вЂ” SESSION AND LOGOUT
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

1. Login as owner.
2. Open Owner AI.
3. Open Control.
4. Open Admin.
5. Logout.
6. Confirm Supabase sign-out completes.
7. Confirm owner state clears.
8. Confirm Owner Login appears.
9. Press Android Back repeatedly.
10. Confirm protected screens cannot reopen.
11. Use the Android app switcher.
12. Return to IVX.
13. Confirm protected content is not visible.
14. Force-stop and reopen.
15. Confirm approved session policy.
16. Login again.
17. Confirm owner access works again.

Run 10 login/logout cycles.

Required:

- 10/10 PASS
- no duplicate listeners
- no false non-owner result
- no owner-route bypass
- no automatic wrong-account login

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 10 вЂ” NON-OWNER SECURITY
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Use a valid non-owner account.

Attempt:

- Owner AI
- Control
- Admin
- direct owner routes
- deep links
- owner APIs
- owner database queries

Required:

- all owner access denied
- no sensitive data shown
- no owner UI flash
- correct 403/RLS response
- normal non-owner access remains functional

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 11 вЂ” FAILURE RECOVERY
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Simulate:

- no internet
- slow internet
- Supabase timeout
- backend timeout
- 401
- 403
- malformed response
- app background during login
- network restored

Required:

- no black screen
- no infinite spinner
- no false non-owner downgrade
- Retry works
- Sign Out works
- exact error category
- trace ID shown
- recovery does not duplicate listeners

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 12 вЂ” 10-LAUNCH TEST
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Perform 10 cold launches.

For each record:

- launch number
- startup time
- first screen
- owner state
- error count
- trace ID
- PASS or FAIL

Required:

- 10/10 PASS
- zero black screens
- zero render loops
- zero infinite loaders
- zero false owner denials

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 13 вЂ” FINAL STATUS MARKING
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Use only these status values:

- NOT STARTED
- RUNNING
- PASS вЂ” CODE
- PASS вЂ” API
- PASS вЂ” DATABASE
- PASS вЂ” REAL DEVICE
- FAIL
- BLOCKED

Do not mark any runtime item verified using code evidence only.

Every final owner item must be:

PASS вЂ” REAL DEVICE

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
FINAL EVIDENCE REQUIRED
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Return:

1. Build 33 filename
2. Direct APK link
3. APK SHA-256
4. package ID
5. versionCode
6. GitHub SHA
7. backend SHA
8. /health SHA
9. diagnostics SHA
10. SHA alignment table
11. clean-install result
12. 10-launch table
13. 10 login/logout-cycle table
14. owner-login trace
15. owner profile verification
16. Owner AI message proof
17. Control proof
18. Admin proof
19. 12-module runtime QA table
20. media QA table
21. non-owner denial proof
22. logout/back-navigation proof
23. failure-recovery proof
24. Android logcat
25. complete physical-device recording
26. screenshots of:
    - Owner Login
    - successful owner authorization
    - Owner AI response
    - Control
    - Admin
    - Members
    - Projects
    - Deals
    - Reels
    - logout
    - non-owner denied
27. remaining blockers

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
FINAL ACCEPTANCE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Only declare:

IVX ENTERPRISE PRODUCTION VERIFIED 100%

when:

- Build 33 installs successfully
- all SHAs match
- correct owner signs in
- red owner warning is gone
- Owner AI sends and receives
- Control works
- Admin works
- all 12 modules pass on the real device
- uploads work
- reels work
- logout works
- Android Back protection works
- non-owner is denied
- 10 cold launches pass
- 10 login/logout cycles pass
- no duplicate listeners
- no black screen
- no infinite loading
- no render loop
- all final items are marked PASS вЂ” REAL DEVICE

If any item fails, do not declare 100%.

Return only:

- failed step
- failed root
- exact screen
- exact sanitized error
- trace ID
- file
- line
- fix
- rebuilt APK
- retest result

Begin with STEP 1 and continue automatically through STEP 13.
